summary: Shimmer and sweep shining text effect component for Remotion.

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/title-shimmer/src/TitleShimmer.tsx` into your Remotion project, import `TitleShimmer` and `titleShimmerDefaultProps`, then register the `TitleShimmer` composition with duration 120, fps 30, width 1920, and height 1080.
artifact.agentPrompt: Add the Title Shimmer Remotion asset from remotionhub/remotionhub-assets at remotion/title-shimmer to my project. Preserve the exported TitleShimmerProps API and register the TitleShimmer composition with the default props.
